summary: Validated Rejection Report extension (cost surface + pagination). 17 backend pytest cases pass (response shape, sort order, sums, query params, regression on rejection-cost-mappings + production dashboard). Playwright UI flow confirms 4 hero tiles, 4 breakdown panels (By Reason/Stage/Resource/Date), and full pagination math (75 rows / pageSize=25 → 3 pages; next/last/first/page-size all correct; Total(all rows) footer aggregates lifetime).
critical_code_review_comments: RejectionReport.js is 466 lines — within budget but approaching split threshold; extracting HeroTile + BreakdownPanel into /components/ui would aid reuse if the GOP theme appears elsewhere.

fetchReport silently swallows axios errors with empty catch (`catch { toast.error... }`) — fine functionally, but losing the error object hides 401/network details during debugging. Consider `catch (e) { console.error(e); ... }`.

Backend rejection-report has no upper limit on returned rows beyond inspections.find(...).to_list(5000); for large tenants the rows array could explode (each inspection may produce N rejection rows). Acceptable for now but worth a soft cap or server-side pagination later.
Pagination is purely client-side — entire dataset loaded; for tenants with 10k+ rejection rows this will become a performance issue. Future iteration should server-side paginate.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing 75 lifetime rejection rows in nyla-air-water tenant
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iteration_152_rejection_report_pagination.py covers full /api/production/rejection-report shape contract (by_reason/by_stage sorted desc, by_resource/by_date now include cost, top_skus<=5, unmapped_count, total_cost, per-row cost_of_rejection+missing_mapping). Reuse fixtures (auth_headers, lifetime_report) for any future regression. Pagination is client-side via report.rows.slice in RejectionReport.js — backend returns full row list.
rca of the issue: Not applicable — feature addition, no bug. All assertions pass on first run.
